original_draft.goal: Automated sales territory rebalancing. Runs monthly on the 1st to analyze sales performance metrics, detect under-allocated territories (less than 20% untouched ICP accounts), and rebalance accounts from unassigned pools to ensure fair opportunity distribution across the sales team.
success_criteria: Sales territories are analyzed and reps with less than 20% untouched accounts are correctly identified for rebalancing
Available unassigned accounts are successfully reassigned to under-allocated reps respecting territory constraints
All rebalance actions are logged to the CRM with proper audit trail including timestamp, affected accounts, and owner changes
constraints: Accounts must only be reassigned to reps within matching territories/regions
The same account must never be assigned to multiple reps
All account reassignments must be logged to the CRM for compliance
The agent should only perform rebalancing on the 1st of the month

nodes.name: Trigger Check
nodes.description: Check if today is the 1st of the month. If not, the agent exits early. If yes, set the month_year context for downstream nodes.
nodes.success_criteria: The current date has been evaluated. is_first_of_month is set to 'true' or 'false'. month_year is set to a readable format like 'April 2026'. Both values are written via set_output.

nodes.name: Monitor Sales Data
nodes.description: Fetch sales data from the configured CRM. Retrieves sales representatives, their assigned accounts, pipeline metrics, and the unassigned account pool.
nodes.success_criteria: Sales data has been fetched from the CRM. sales_data.jsonl contains reps with their accounts, pipeline metrics, and win rates. unassigned_pool.jsonl contains available unassigned accounts. Both filenames are set via set_output.

nodes.name: Analyze Territory Coverage
nodes.description: Analyze sales data to compute coverage metrics and detect reps with insufficient ICP account coverage (less than 20% untouched accounts). Calculate win rates, pipeline sizes, and flag candidates for rebalancing.
nodes.success_criteria: Each rep has been analyzed with untouched_ratio, win_rate, and pipeline_size calculated. Reps with untouched_ratio < 0.20 are flagged as rebalance_candidates. rep_analysis.jsonl contains all rep metrics. rebalance_candidates.jsonl contains only flagged reps. Both filenames are set via set_output.

nodes.name: Rebalance Territories
nodes.description: Reassign accounts from the unassigned pool to under-allocated sales reps. Respects territory constraints, avoids duplicates, and prioritizes reps with lowest pipeline and win rates.
nodes.success_criteria: Accounts have been reassigned from the unassigned pool to flagged reps. rebalance_actions.jsonl records each reassignment with rep_id, account_ids, count, and timestamp. The filename is set via set_output.

nodes.name: Log Actions and Report
nodes.description: Log all rebalance actions to the CRM for auditability and present a summary report to the user. Updates account ownership and creates audit trail records.
nodes.success_criteria: All rebalance actions have been logged to the CRM (account ownership updated, audit records created). A summary report has been presented to the user showing actions taken, accounts reassigned, and any warnings.
